vibe: Premium boutique wellness for pets. Warm, trustworthy, high-end editorial feel.

headings.style_notes: Use tracking-tight for H1/H2. Elegance over raw power. Never use Inter or Roboto.

body.style_notes: Clean geometric legibility to balance the serif headings.

layout_spacing.marketing: Mode A 'Tetris' grid. Generous padding (p-16 to p-32). Asymmetrical blocks for services.
layout_spacing.dashboard: Mode B 'Control Room' grid. Dense but bordered (p-6 to p-8). Flat cards with 1px borders.
layout_spacing.corner_radius: rounded-3xl for main containers/images, rounded-full for buttons/badges.
layout_spacing.general: Never center-everything by default. Use left-alignment for dense content and forms. Use optical alignment for buttons with icons.

components.buttons: Flat background. Primary (#1E3F2D) for main actions, Secondary (#D96C4A) for highlights (Book Now). No heavy shadows. Hover: slight translateY and color tint. Include data-testid.
components.cards: Surface color (#F1EBE1) with 1px border (#E5DFD3) and zero shadow. Inside padding p-6 or p-8.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but override radius to rounded-xl, background to #FDFBF7, border to #E5DFD3. Must have focus states (ring-primary).
components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80) for sticky headers. 1px bottom border (#E5DFD3).
components.google_login: Custom styled button, #FDFBF7 background, 1px border, Outfit font, Google G icon.
components.pdf_invoice: Clean, tabular format using pure HTML/CSS optimized for printing. High contrast, serif headers for the brand name, minimal borders.

icons_and_assets.style: Use stroke-width 1.5 for elegance. Avoid filled icons.

images.description: Dog and cat looking relaxed. Use for main landing hero.
Premium dog profile for 'Deluxe Spa' package.
Poodle in sweater for 'Full Grooming' package.
Yawning calico cat for 'Cat Grooming' package.
White and brown puppy for testimonial / about section.

media.overlay_rules: Never use opaque black overlays. If overlay needed, use bg-white/20 to bg-white/40 for light theme or soft gradient.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='service-package-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' are imported via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do NOT use HTML <input type='date'> for the booking flow; use Shadcn Calendar.
Do NOT use raw <select>; use Shadcn Select/Dropdown.
Build the dashboard components without heavy Shadcn 'Card' wrappers if they add unwanted default box-shadows. Strip shadows and use border/bg colors specified.
For the PDF invoice, render a visually clean DOM element and use browser print or a lightweight client-side PDF generator (like html2pdf.js) if necessary.
Ensure all user flows (login, book, dashboard) are seamlessly connected with React Router.
